entries.title: Custom Asset Tracker for precise detection of asset creation, deletion, and modification
"Open Prefab" options now target the selected relative child inside nested Prefab instances

Option to reuse the closest unlocked Tab when the active one is locked
(Settings Window -> If the Active Tab is Locked -> Reuse closest unlocked Tab)
"Frame targets on Tab switch" now works when creating new tabs
"Open Prefab in Scene/Isolation" now opens the closest parent Prefab instead of the root
Prefab instances not refreshing immediately when changing the linked Prefab Asset on the Tab header
Materials causing import loops if their start scripts modify themselves
"Frame targets on Tab switch" being triggered with regular multi-selections
Tab hover information not showing properly after reopening and resizing CoInspector
Deleting multiple GameObjects at once sometimes triggering an error message
